name: Dog Pics
description: Get random dog-image URLs across all breeds or for a selected breed from the public Dog CEO image catalog.

auth.hint: No authentication is required for public Dog CEO read endpoints.

tools.name: get_random_dog
tools.description: Return one random dog image URL from the full catalog.

tools.name: get_random_breed_dog
tools.description: Return one random dog image URL for a selected breed.
